case_title: VANASEK, RUDY vs. JACKSON, RHONDA AKA RHONDA WILSON et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VANASEK, RUDY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON, RHONDA AKA RHONDA WILSON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 672-A WALLER ST

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, RHONDA AKA RHONDA WILSON
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VANASEK, RUDY SERVED NOV-17-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, RHONDA AKA RHONDA WILSON
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $8.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF VANASEK, RUDY
DECLARATION RE UNAVAILABILITY FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF VANASEK, RUDY
